title: ToolCatalog
description: Append-only cross-session knowledge base of confirmed tools. Stored at opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/knowledge/tool-catalog.json. Plugin `claw-compactor` calls `mergeAppend` on every checkpoint: new entries are inserted; entries with an existing `id` only update `last_seen_session` and increment `confirmations`. Facts (kind, first_seen_session, evidence[]) are never overwritten.

id.description: Stable dotted id, e.g. `mcp.searchbox`. Unique within the catalog.

first_seen_session.description: Session id of the first checkpoint that introduced this tool.

last_seen_session.description: Session id of the most recent checkpoint that confirmed this tool.

evidence.description: Union of evidence anchors observed across all checkpoints (deduplicated).

confirmations.description: Number of distinct checkpoints that confirmed this tool. Monotonic.
